SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: High Player Arrow
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Show aim arrow while charging (top player)

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Low Player Arrow
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Show aim arrow while charging (bottom player)

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: High Player Charge Fill
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Show charge fill bar while charging (top player)

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Low Player Charge Fill
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Show charge fill bar while charging (bottom player)
